name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl & Sopi backend v4.89 — crack multi-param Weimi GET signing: rawOrdersDiagnostic now tests signing strategies (query-string order vs alphabetical sort vs strings vs deviceCode-only) for the order-list endpoint. Single-param works, multi-param returns Signature error; this finds the correct canonicalization. Incl v4.86 favicon + mobile fixes.
